think.linePrev: And offered me a pipe
think.line: "I thought you'd never say hello," she said
think.lineNext: "You look like the silent type"

And offered me a pipe
"I thought you'd never say hello," she said
"You look like the silent type"
Then she opened up a book of poems
And handed it to me
Written by an Italian poet
From the thirteenth century
And every one of them words rang true
And glowed like burning coal
Pouring off of every page
Like it was written in my soul
From me to you
Tangled up in blue

think.linePrev: Forever this time
think.line: And the old lovers sing, "I thought it'd be me
think.lineNext: Who helped him get home"

And I'm a real emcee so I don't need a crazy beat to flex
I just let my lyrics do the talking, so uh, how long did I make this beat?
45 minutes? Yeesh! Alright... let's go!

Be my man, be my man
Be my man, be my man
No one can be my woman, be my woman
Be my woman

twist.linePrev: The haunted, frightened trees, out to the windy beach
twist.line: Far from the twisted reach of crazy sorrow
twist.lineNext: Yes, to dance beneath the diamond sky with one hand waving free
stanza: And take me disappearing through the smoke rings of my mind
Down the foggy ruins of time, far past the frozen leaves
The haunted, frightened trees, out to the windy beach
Far from the twisted reach of crazy sorrow
Yes, to dance beneath the diamond sky with one hand waving free
Silhouetted by the sea, circled by the circus sands
With all memory and fate driven deep beneath the waves
Let me forget about today until tomorrow

twist.linePrev: To you who brought me back to life
twist.line: To twisted thorns that grow inside
twist.lineNext: The shingle washing my old bones
stanza: To you who brought me back to life
To twisted thorns that grow inside
The shingle washing my old bones
Of woe betides and woe begones
With just enough love to go 'round
For you who's turning me back on
Doesn't make it right or wrong
For prisoners of the mind
Of woe begones and woe betides
And just enough love to go 'round

twist.line: It's a cruel kind of twist that you'd leave like this
twist.lineNext: Just drop my wrist and say, "Well, that's us done"
stanza: Think about now with my legs wrapped around you
How many times before have you seen me run?
(Run, run, run)
It's a cruel kind of twist that you'd leave like this
Just drop my wrist and say, "Well, that's us done"
(Done done done)

twist.linePrev: Hit him like a freight train
twist.line: Moving with a simple twist of fate
stanza: They walked alone by the old canal
A little confused, I remember well
And stopped into a strange hotel
With a neon burning bright
He felt the heat of the night
Hit him like a freight train
Moving with a simple twist of fate

twist.linePrev: But I was born too late
twist.line: Blame it on a simple twist of fate
stanza: People tell me it's a sin
To know and feel too much within
I still believe she was my twin
But I lost the ring
She was born in spring
But I was born too late
Blame it on a simple twist of fate

twist.linePrev: To which he just could not relate
twist.line: Brought on by a simple twist of fate
twist.lineNext: He hears the ticking of the clocks
stanza: He woke up, the room was bare
He didn't see her anywhere
He told himself he didn't care
Pushed the window open wide
Felt an emptiness inside
To which he just could not relate
Brought on by a simple twist of fate

twist.linePrev: Of a blind man at the gate
twist.line: And forgot about a simple twist of fate
twist.lineNext: He woke up, the room was bare
stanza: A saxophone someplace far-off played
As she was walking on by the arcade
As the light bust through a beat-up shade
Where he was wakin' up
She dropped a coin into the cup
Of a blind man at the gate

tight.line: Now I rhyme tight with no slack, I'm back, I'm back, I'm back, I'm back
tight.lineNext: I'm back and you're addicted to me like smack
stanza: I started out as whack, I took the time to fine tune my craft
Fast forward my time lapse
Now I rhyme tight with no slack, I'm back, I'm back, I'm back, I'm back
I'm back and you're addicted to me like smack
So Inhale my words like crack, relax and let your eyes roll back
I'll align your spine with a tap
I can see my abs now I sat up, I got a six-pack now

At last I finally found my knack
I took the bite from the apple on your mac

I got more lines than topography maps
I more obsessed with myself than making sure that you clap
But I know you're sitting there in your chair
Making your head move forward and back
I molded these rhymes to be harder than a cast
I read (Read) and breathe more jazz than a sax
I stick to my pacts I'm truthful like that
I snack on anything like a pack of rats
I'll give you a smack if you say you hate blacks
But as a matter of fact, I hate black cats
If I see one in my path, fuck that I'll take the long way back
And I'm a scholar in college but don't ever say that I'm frat rap
That's whack crap about smashing fat racks and raping girls with fat asses
If I ever saw that happen, I would rip off your nutsacks!
I kid, but don't give me a reason to create a bloodbath

tower.linePrev: And he spent a long time watching
tower.lineNext: And when he knew for certain
stanza: And Jesus was a sailor
When he walked upon the water
And he spent a long time watching
From his lonely wooden tower
And when he knew for certain
Only drowning men could see him
He said, "All men will be sailors then
Until the sea shall free them"
But he himself was broken
Long before the sky would open
Forsaken, almost human
He sank beneath your wisdom like a stone

tower.linePrev: And Ezra Pound and T. S. Eliot
tower.lineNext: While calypso singers laugh at them

Everybody's shouting

And Ezra Pound and T. S. Eliot
Fighting in the captain's tower
While calypso singers laugh at them
And fishermen hold flowers
Between the windows of the sea
Where lovely mermaids flow
And nobody has to think too much
About Desolation Row

teacher.linePrev: The pressure is precise, the ethics of a man I like to exercise
teacher.line: Experience is the best teacher of wrong versus right
stanza: I see, I see hip-hop as a gun, it gives power to the man who yields one
But it gives a whole nother level of power to the man who really knows how to w…

But it takes a whole lotta work to go professional

Allah reincarnated with Muhammad

trust.linePrev: Barking at the mailman to be gone
trust.lineNext: It seems like they're crooked and crumblin'
stanza: I came out, I came out, I came out, I came out
And when my mother came around, she said "I hate your sound"
I thought "Fuck you talking 'bout now?"
She said "You're not brown, you didn't grow up downtown
Sometimes I think you do these things just to see me frown"
I thought "Fuck off, can't knock me down"
I'm not in this for a crown, I'm in this only for the sound
Who needs to care whether I'm black white or brown?
It's only what I say and convey that counts

Eat sleep and play with repeat on
Barking at the mailman to be gone

I got a relationship with God
And he says "Dog, it's all backwards, our spots
Responsibility in you, in knocks
You're the new boss, take it out for a shot"
I'm shocked, for a second my heart stopped
And my stomach dropped, me and God just flopped...
So the first thing I’mma do is smash the crown with a rock
Burn the throne, no more idols to mock
My idea of leadership is like Spock
Rid of emotion and respect the cock (Atmosphere)
Eat, sleep and fuck is what we got
Take it back to the basics of the block
I need your help so give me your hand
There's a revolution out there for us to understand
All of us create it, there's no plan
Shits been spinning the same like a fan
Let stand, and create a template to end all of what we debate
This is a race, keep your pace

stanza: I'm about to inject you with the verbal slime
The vegetables of rhyme, nutrition for your mind
Poke your nerves in your spine
Emcees be all over the place with their rhymes

I kiss the mic with affection
My mind is taking time for some stretchin'
Bending galaxies into my verbal collection

I eat rappers like amino

That way if I need to snap a neck, I can creep slow
I'm quiet but alert like Cappuccino
For every rhyme you have, I got a kilo
I torpedo my ego of being half Latino
With rhymes that are jalapeño
A mean flow, like a lunch money
Bully, I got leverage like a pulley
Pull your body in the gully, then assassinate ya subtly
Fire rhymes, I'll boil your blood till it's bubbly
I must boil your blood because I can't leave evidence
I can't have a conscious that is decadence
I'm perfecting the elements, so I can raise a hell-ish genesis
Inject ya membranous tissues with my sentences
Your brain is my new residence
So prepare for ideas of excellence and long nights of restlessness
I'm reckless, I'll erode your skeletal with tetanus
Spit the most venomous, leave you stranded in a nebulous
Unless you're in for my best interest
I'll show you benevolence, fly us away on a Pegasus
Let you benefit from my intelligence
My rhymes are the perception of medicine that is perfection
Known to cure cancer, bulimia and depression

torpedo.line: I torpedo my ego of being half Latino
stanza: I'm about to inject you with the verbal slime
The vegetables of rhyme, nutrition for your mind
Poke your nerves in your spine
Emcees be all over the place with their rhymes
While mine remain defined, glued to perfection
I kiss the mic with affection
My mind is taking time for some stretchin'
Bending galaxies into my verbal collection
My ethics remain the most pristine
You don't know half the shit I've seen
Drugs, violence and money ain't my scene
That shit's obscene, failure is not in my genome
I eat rappers like amino
Acid I spit, I'm sick make you need chemo
I got the heart of a king, I'm casino
I keep my profile on the D-low
That way if I need to snap a neck, I can creep slow
I'm quiet but alert like Cappuccino
For every rhyme you have, I got a kilo
I torpedo my ego of being half Latino
With rhymes that are jalapeño
A mean flow, like a lunch money

I'm perfecting the elements, so I can raise a hell-ish genesis

Your brain is my new residence

Let you benefit from my intelligence
My rhymes are the perception of medicine that is perfection

Shoves a little bump into the momentum
It's just a little lump but you feel it
In the creases and the shadows
With a rattling deep emotion
The cool, cool river
Sweeps the wild, white ocean

tail.songTitle: Decatur, or, Round of Applause for Your Stepmother!
tail.linePrev: But Abraham Lincoln was the great emancipator
tail.lineNext: I had my fill and I know how bad it feels
stanza: Chickenmobile with your rooster tail
I had my fill and I know how bad it feels
Stay awake and watch for the data
No small Caterpillar, go congratulate her

partner.line: Stay awake and watch for the data

tail.linePrev: And you're up early on your ranch
tail.line: You'll be brushing out a broodmare's tail
stanza: No regrets, Coyote
We just come from such different sets of circumstance
I'm up all night in the studios
And you're up early on your ranch
You'll be brushing out a broodmare's tail
While the sun is ascending
And I'll just be getting home with my reel-to-reel
There's no comprehending
Just how close to the bone and the skin and the eyes
And the lips you can get
And still feel so alone
And still feel related
Like stations in some relay
You're not a hit-and-run driver, no no
Racing away

tought.linePrev: And you gave me that and more
tought.line: You tought me how to do
stanza: Twas on a night like this
I blew in through your door
I asked for kindness
And you gave me that and more
You tought me how to do
The things that lovers do
Like coming through
And loving you
I've got my banjo tuned
But now I've lost the band
I must have missed the turn
I never learn it seems
My music is my dreams
Tis what I do
They close the hall
And put away the microphones
I'm all alone and I'd lay scratching at the strings
Then my banjo sings as banjoes often do
I'm coming through, and loving you

theyd.linePrev: A crowd of people stood and stared
theyd.lineNext: Nobody was really sure if he was from the house of lords
stanza: 1 ContributorA Day In The Life LyricsI read the news today, oh, boy
About a lucky man whos made the grade
And though the news was rather sad
Well, I just had to laugh
I saw the photograph
He blew his mind out in a car
He didn't notice that the lights have changed
A crowd of people stood and stared
Theyd seen his face before
Nobody was really sure if he was from the house of lords

thoughtlessness.line: My mixed emotions at my thoughtlessness
thoughtlessness.lineNext: After all, I'm forever in your debt
stanza: Woman, I can hardly express
My mixed emotions at my thoughtlessness
After all, I'm forever in your debt
And woman, I will try to express
My inner feelings and thankfulness
For showing me the meaning of success

thankfulness.linePrev: And woman, I will try to express
thankfulness.lineNext: For showing me the meaning of success
stanza: Woman, I can hardly express
My mixed emotions at my thoughtlessness
After all, I'm forever in your debt
And woman, I will try to express
My inner feelings and thankfulness
For showing me the meaning of success

tragedy.linePrev: In the middle of nowhere, in the middle of the night
tragedy.line: And we rolled right past that tragedy
tragedy.lineNext: Till we pulled into some roadhouse lights
stanza: We saw a farmhouse burning down
In the middle of nowhere, in the middle of the night
And we rolled right past that tragedy
Till we pulled into some roadhouse lights
Where a local band was playing
Locals were up kicking and shaking on the floor
And the next thing I know
That coyote's at my door
He pins me in a corner and he won't take no
He drags me out on the dance floor
And we're dancing close and slow
Now he's got a woman at home
He's got another woman down the hall
He seems to want me anyway
Why'd you have to get so drunk
And lead me on that way?

tragedy.lineNext: We did as we were told, bought and sold
stanza: We watched the tragedy unfold
We did as we were told, bought and sold
It was the greatest show on Earth
But then, it was over
We oohed and ahhed, we drove our racing cars
We ate our last few jars of caviar
And somewhere out there in the stars
A keen-eyed lookout spied a flickering light
(Our last hurrah)
Our last hurrah
And when they found our shadows
Grouped 'round the TV sets
They ran down every lead
They repeated every test
They checked out all the data on their list
And then, the alien anthropologists
Admitted they were still perplexed
But on eliminating every other reason for our sad demise
They logged the only explanation left
This species has amused itself to death
(Amused itself to death, amused itself to death)
(Amused itself to death, amused itself to death)

temporary.linePrev: Where the players lick their wounds
temporary.lineNext: And their pills and powders to get them through this passion play
stanza: I looked a coyote right in the face
On the road to Baljennie near my old hometown
He went running through the whisker wheat
Chasing some prize down
And a hawk was playing with him
Coyote was jumping straight up and making passes
He had those same eyes just like yours
Under your dark glasses
Privately probing the public rooms
And peeking through keyholes in numbered doors
Where the players lick their wounds
And take their temporary lovers
And their pills and powders to get them through this passion play
No regrets, Coyote
I just get off up aways

thaw.linePrev: Now here's a man and a woman sitting on a rock
thaw.line: They're either going to thaw out, or freeze
stanza: Now here's a man and a woman sitting on a rock
They're either going to thaw out, or freeze
Listen: strains of Benny Goodman
Coming through the snow and the pinewood trees

tribute.linePrev: Well, I looked at the granite markers
tribute.line: Those tributes to finality, to eternity
tribute.lineNext: And then I looked at myself here
stanza: Well, I looked at the granite markers
Those tributes to finality, to eternity
And then I looked at myself here
Chicken scratching for my immortality

travelogue.linePrev: If it gets through to you
travelogue.line: Then your life becomes a travelogue
stanza: The drone of flying engines
Is a song so wild and blue
It scrambles time and seasons
If it gets through to you
Then your life becomes a travelogue
Of picture-postcard charms

thunderhead.linePrev: And I brought on my old ways
stanza: There was spring along the ditches
There were good times in the cities
Oh, radiant happiness
It was all so light and easy
'Til I started analyzing
And I brought on my old ways
A thunderhead of judgment was
Gathering in my gaze
And it made most people nervous
They just didn't wanna know
What I was seeing in the refuge of the roads

taiking.linePrev: I'm in trouble 'cause you're a rambler and a gambler
taiking.line: And a sweet taIking ladies man
stanza: Help me, I think I'm falling in love again
When I get that crazy feeling, I know I'm in trouble again
I'm in trouble 'cause you're a rambler and a gambler
And a sweet taIking ladies man

telephone.linePrev: You had cancer of the bone
telephone.line: Your father cried on the telephone
telephone.lineNext: And he drove his car into the Navy yard
stanza: Goldenrod and the 4H stone
The things I brought you when I found out
You had cancer of the bone
Your father cried on the telephone
And he drove his car into the Navy yard
Just to prove that he was sorry

partner.line: You had cancer of the bone

telephone.line: You can get me on the telephone
telephone.lineNext: But you won't keep me there
stanza: You see the thing is we are so alone
There's nothing we can share
You can get me on the telephone
But you won't keep me there
No no no you won't keep me there

partner.line: You see the thing is we are so alone

telephone.line: You could get me on the telephone
telephone.lineNext: But you won't keep me there
stanza: You see the thing is we are so alone
There's nothing we can share
You could get me on the telephone
But you won't keep me there
No no no you won't keep me there

partner.line: You see the thing is we are so alone

telephone.linePrev: It sent a chill up and down my spine
telephone.line: When I picked up the telephone
telephone.lineNext: And heard that he'd died out on the mainline
stanza: Early in the morning, at the break of day
He used to sleep until the afternoon
If you never heard him sing
I guess you won't too soon
'Cause, people, let me tell you
It sent a chill up and down my spine
When I picked up the telephone
And heard that he'd died out on the mainline

telephone.linePrev: When I try to get through
stanza: And that is how I know
When I try to get through
On the telephone to you
There will be nobody home

telephone.linePrev: Stoking the star maker machinery behind the popular song
telephone.line: I deal in dreamers and telephone screamers
telephone.lineNext: Lately I wonder what I do it for
stanza: I deal in dreamers and telephone screamers
Lately I wonder what I do it for
If l had my way, I'd just walk through those doors
And wander down the Champs-Élysées
Going café to cabaret
Thinking how I'll feel when I find
That very good friend of mine

taxi.linePrev: Late last night, I heard the screen door slam
taxi.line: And a big yellow taxi took away my old man
taxi.lineNext: Don't it always seem to go
stanza: Late last night, I heard the screen door slam
And a big yellow taxi took away my old man

taxi.line: The taxis run across my feet
taxi.lineNext: And my eyes have turned to blanks
stanza: They massacred the buffalo
Kitty corner from the bank
The taxis run across my feet
And my eyes have turned to blanks
In my little box
At the top of the stairs
With my Indian rug
And a pipe to share

tearful.linePrev: Fearful when the sky was full of thunder
tearful.line: And tearful at the falling of a star
tearful.lineNext: And the seasons, they go 'round and 'round
stanza: Yesterday a child came out to wonder
Caught a dragonfly inside a jar
Fearful when the sky was full of thunder
And tearful at the falling of a star

there'll.lineNext: Now that you've found it, it's gone
stanza: Don't get any big ideas
They're not gonna happen
You paint yourself white
And fill up with noise
But there'll be something missing

there'll.lineNext: But you may feel a little sick
stanza: Okay
Just a little pin prick *ding*
There'll be no more ''AHHHHHHHHHHHHH!''
But you may feel a little sick
Can you stand up?
I do believe it's working, good
That'll keep you going through the show
Come on, it's time to go

there'll.linePrev: Though his dreams have lost some grandeur coming true
there'll.line: There'll be new dreams, maybe better dreams and plenty
there'll.lineNext: Before the last revolving year is through
stanza: So, the years spin by and now the boy is twenty
Though his dreams have lost some grandeur coming true
There'll be new dreams, maybe better dreams and plenty
Before the last revolving year is through

trend.linePrev: A lonely beast, a kind heart
trend.lineNext: I'd do it all for her for free
stanza: Of course there’s things upon the Earth
That we must really try to defend
A lonely beast, a kind heart
Something weak and on trend

partner.line: That we must really try to defend

tendency.linePrev: You're not afraid of trees or bears
stanza: I won't forget the late September
Where we basked among the midnight embers
But it's going like a half-remembered dream
Left and north of where we met
Thinking better of going west
Yeah we lost each other in that river stream
I thought I'd come and find you there
Wait until you lost your hair
And got your place out in the woods
You're not afraid of trees or bears
Or anything with tendencies
To wanna hurt you good

partner.line: You're not afraid of trees or bears

tidal.linePrev: That's supposed to keep you safe
tidal.line: And you roll like a tidal wave
tidal.lineNext: And you roll like a tidal wave
stanza: Changed how you feel
It's good to break the seal
And blow us both away
Get to changing all the time
And it starts to blur the line
That's supposed to keep you safe
And you roll like a tidal wave
And you roll like a tidal wave

tread.linePrev: Meek and obedient, you follow the leader
tread.line: Down well-trodden corridors, into the valley of steel
stanza: What do you get for pretending the danger's not real
Meek and obedient, you follow the leader
Down well-trodden corridors, into the valley of steel
What a surprise!
A look of terminal shock in your eyes
Now things are really what they seem
No, this is no bad dream

tread.line: Though they may want you to tread in their trail
tread.lineNext: Only to see if the path they set fails
stanza: Though they may want you to tread in their trail
Only to see if the path they set fails
Though they may want you to take off your clothes
Whatever they think that the action exposed
With your clothes on the floor
Taking advice from some old balding bore
You'll ask yourself, "Did I want this at all?"

tow.linePrev: And the arms that fed and the babes that wed
tow.line: And the backs that bled keeping her in tow
stanza: But the love of your life lives but lies no more
And where she lay a flower grows
And the arms that fed and the babes that wed
And the backs that bled keeping her in tow

partner.line: And where she lay a flower grows
